title: Breaking: FDA Rejects Replimune Drug Again; Revolution Medicines Pancreatic Cancer Pill Advances
summary: GSK advances ovarian cancer drug mo-rez through clinical pipeline with positive momentum. FDA issues second rejection of Replimune's cancer drug while Revolution Medicines' pancreatic cancer pill continues to advance.
